channel.title: Disaster-Recovery on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Disaster-Recovery on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Site Recovery Support for Virtual Machines with Premium SSD v2 disks
item.description:
Azure Site Recovery (ASR) now generally available for Virtual Machines using Premium SSD v2 disks, enabling seamless disaster recovery across Azure regions and from on-premises to Azure to help maintain business continuity.

  • Source: Azure Updates
